name: Evilswarm Exciton Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>励</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヴェルズビュート
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Once per Chain, during your Main Phase or your opponent's Battle Phase, if your opponent has more total cards in their hand and field than you do (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; destroy all other cards on the field, also for the rest of this turn, your opponent takes no damage.
